title: amaryllis × ignescens
intro: Amaryllis × ignescens, also known as the fire lily or naked lady, is a hybrid plant derived from the Amaryllis belladonna species and other varieties of Amaryllis. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, which can aid in treating respiratory issues and skin conditions. The health benefits of Amaryllis × ignescens include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate coughs, and soothe sore throats, making it a popular herbal remedy. Amaryllis × ignescens is often prepared as a tincture, tea, or infusion for its medicinal uses, although its preparations and uses should be carefully considered due to potential toxicity.
